from ... import ....description: Import statement that allows individual objects from the module to be imported directly into the caller’s symbol table.

class.description: Code snippet for a class definition

New class.description: Code snippet for a class definition.

if.description: Code snippet for the if statement.

if/else.description: Code snippet for an if statement with else

for.description: Code snippet to create a for loop structure.

try:except:.description: Code Snippet for a try and except blocks.

try:except:else:finally.description: Code Snippet for a try/except/finally with else statement.

self.description: Shortend snippet to reference the self property in an object.

if __name__ == \"__main__\".description: Create implicitly all the code at the top level using the __name__ special variable.
